title: Do you think Kaworu will come back in 3010
display_title: Do you think Kaworu will come back in 3010
wikitext:
[]: Do you think Kaworu will come back in 3.0+1.0?             Quote Post by KurisuNimii » Sun Jul 26, 2020 8:15 pm What do you think about that? his phrase "we will see each other again" implied that he will come back, but how? he will go back to having a body and try to make Shinji happy? and will he stay permanently? or die again? I really believe in the nge/eoe-rebuild loop theory but I'm still in doubt, i believe that Kaworu can have a body again, like transferring his soul to his new body, but as I no longer know how I just really wanted him to stay alive

[]: Re: Do you think Kaworu will come back in 3.0+1.0?             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Jul 26, 2020 8:18 pm Do you have any thoughts on the matter? With question threads like this, it's infinitely preferable if the OP offers their own thoughts first. Be a participant in your own thread, and such. I think he exists inside Eva 13 now, the same way Rei exists inside Eva-01. And, same as Rei can mysteriously appear outside of the Eva sometimes, Kaworu will be able to do the same at dramatically appropriate moments. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Do you think Kaworu will come back in 3.0+1.0?             Quote Post by KurisuNimii » Sun Jul 26, 2020 8:26 pm Reichu wrote: Do you have any thoughts on the matter? With question threads like this, it's infinitely preferable if the OP offers their own thoughts first. Be a participant in your own thread, and such. I think he exists inside Eva 13 now, the same way Rei exists inside Eva-01. And, same as Rei can mysteriously appear outside of the Eva sometimes, Kaworu will be able to do the same at dramatically appropriate moments.

[]: Re: Do you think Kaworu will come back in 3.0+1.0?             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Jul 26, 2020 8:43 pm Whenever you have a chance, read through our Forum Rules up top. Don't let them overwhelm you all at once, but just remember they're there. For now, a couple of quick things: use the edit button to add to a post instead of making two posts in a row; and also, when quoting someone, only quote the parts you're responding to. KurisuNimii wrote: I hope this is not true, it would be very sad, I wish he could revive

[]: Re: Do you think Kaworu will come back in 3.0+1.0?             Quote Post by AWinters » Mon Sep 28, 2020 12:13 pm Skip to the end of the 2.22 DVD. It has a preview for 3.0+1.0, which shows a couple more new shots of Kaworu. So, he appears to be there. Unless he turns out to be a dummy version, I'm hopeful.

[]: Re: Do you think Kaworu will come back in 3.0+1.0?             Quote Post by Tajai » Mon Sep 28, 2020 12:34 pm I'm pretty sure that in one of the previews for 3.0+1.0, he does appear alongside Shinji back in Wille, either as an hallucination or just.. I don't know what else, exactly. Point is, he might appear in the new movie or be atleast mentioned, since he now plays a huge part in Shinji's character.

[]: Re: Do you think Kaworu will come back in 3.0+1.0?             Quote Post by AWinters » Mon Sep 28, 2020 12:52 pm Tajai wrote: I'm pretty sure that in one of the previews for 3.0+1.0, he does appear alongside Shinji back in Wille

[]: Re: Do you think Kaworu will come back in 3.0+1.0?             Quote Post by Blockio » Mon Sep 28, 2020 1:21 pm I highly doubt that he is going to return in the way that op means. Eva has always been very consistent about loss of life, he's not just going to pop back up like nothing happened. I believe the same thing as Reichu does, he will only show up as a disembodied presence inside Eva 13, and during final impact

[]: Re: Do you think Kaworu will come back in 3.0+1.0?             Quote Post by AWinters » Mon Sep 28, 2020 1:43 pm Yes, it's possible that "you'll see me again" could have meant "we'll meet again in instrumentality".

[]: Re: Do you think Kaworu will come back in 3.0+1.0?             Quote Post by ShikinamiBogard » Tue Sep 29, 2020 12:09 am On a instrumentality way si posible like on EoE , si the only way , ir maybe on an allucination before Pilot an Eva Again

[]: Re: Do you think Kaworu will come back in 3.0+1.0?             Quote Post by Stan » Sat Oct 24, 2020 11:46 pm While I do agree with what everyone said about him being stuck in Eva 13 going forward and only appearing as a 'ghost' at dramatic moments in the new film, here is another perspective: I would not be surprised if Neo-Nerv can produce clones of him like they do with Rei. The new clone wouldn't have memories of the 3.0 version of him, but the personality and appearance would be the same. That would still count as "meeting again" - though perhaps as enemies this time. I always thought his personality in the final scene of 2.22 was very different than the Kaworu we saw in 3.0, so if the 2.22 Kaworu was stuck in Mark 6 when it sealed Lilith, Neo-Nerv would have made a new clone of him which was the Kaworu we saw in 3.0 (perhaps Gendo also brainwashed him somehow to become Shinji's friend in order to get them to pilot Eva 13, that would explain the different personality between 2.22 and 3.0). Would be funny if all the mass produced evas in the last film have a vegetable Kaworu clone in them.

[]: Re: Do you think Kaworu will come back in 3.0+1.0?             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sun Oct 25, 2020 11:04 am One of the trailers has a shot of Kaworu at Wille in whatever holding cell they're keeping Shinji so it's likely Shinji might see some visions of him throughout the film. Something similar, but on a more intimate level, to the glimpses of a Rei Ayanami figure watching over things that has been all over the series since NGE. And if there is something approaching a EOE type ending it's likely he'll come back in some form. But a physical entity who exists in the same space as the rest of the cast? Slim to unlikely.

[]: Re: Do you think Kaworu will come back in 3.0+1.0?             Quote Post by writer » Sun Oct 25, 2020 2:56 pm The images we've seen of Kaworu thus far seem to point to him being an apparition; a voice inside Shinji's mind that is so palpable and familiar that it seems real, even to the point of Shinji being confused by it or even dismissing it as an illusion. It would not surprise me to see Kaworu appear again as a physical manifestation during an Impact event, since we did see Giant Rei turn into Kaworu for Shinji to finally feel at peace in EoE. But I also think that, by the time Shinji makes it to Impact-event this time around, he won't need anyone to encourage him or walk alongside him.

[]: Re: Do you think Kaworu will come back in 3.0+1.0?             Quote Post by Nao » Sun Oct 25, 2020 3:43 pm Gendo'sPapa wrote: One of the trailers has a shot of Kaworu at Wille in whatever holding cell they're keeping Shinji so it's likely Shinji might see some visions of him throughout the film.

[]: Re: Do you think Kaworu will come back in 3.0+1.0?             Quote Post by dzzthink » Sat Oct 31, 2020 5:42 am Stan wrote: I would not be surprised if Neo-Nerv can produce clones of him like they do with Rei. The new clone wouldn't have memories of the 3.0 version of him, but the personality and appearance would be the same. That would still count as "meeting again" - though perhaps as enemies this time.

[]: Re: Do you think Kaworu will come back in 3.0+1.0?             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sat Oct 31, 2020 5:57 am Nao wrote: Honestly I'm looking forward to see how Shinji will process the fact that Kaworu died. Will he blame WILLE because their DSS Choker killed him? Will he blame Kaworu himself for giving him hope about restoring the world which wasn't possible in the end?

[]: Re: Do you think Kaworu will come back in 3.0+1.0?             Quote Post by dzzthink » Sat Oct 31, 2020 6:08 am To be honest why did Kaworu even put the DSS on in the first place? Could he not deactivate it? By Derantor: ARGH, so sorry - I wanted to reply to your post and edited it instead ... forgive me for being so stupid. >.<

[]: Re: Do you think Kaworu will come back in 3.0+1.0?             Quote Post by BusterMachine4 » Sat Oct 31, 2020 9:12 am dzzthink wrote: To be honest why did Kaworu even put the DSS on in the first place? Could he not deactivate it?

[]: Re: Do you think Kaworu will come back in 3.0+1.0?             Quote Post by dzzthink » Sat Oct 31, 2020 9:53 am By having his head blown off? I guess his untimely death was the necessary to prevent some further catalysm caused by the awakening of an angel, and he himself was an angel. But unlike the series, Kaworu didn't have any special powers and he wasn't able to merge with adam to cause fourth impact.

[]: Re: Do you think Kaworu will come back in 3.0+1.0?             Quote Post by Derantor » Sat Oct 31, 2020 10:29 am Blowing his own head off also didn't do anything. Shinji was SEELE's reinsurance; 4th Impact continued as long he was in the plug, it only stopped when Mari ejected him. Don't ask me why he didn't try to eject Shinji before killing himself. And Kaworu does have special powers. He can take the choker off Shinji, which shouldn't be possible (it should explode when somebody tempers with it - unless it is so badly designed that it has no safe-guard against manipulation). There's also the incredibly effective piano lesson that makes Shinji a pro over the course of a week or so, and him fixing Shinji's SDAT (which might be as simple as switching out the batteries, or as complicated as fixing the microchips on board).

I really believe in the nge/eoe-rebuild loop theory but I'm still in doubt, i believe that Kaworu
